title: Profile
subtitle: Manage your account, password, and sign-in security.
accountSubtitle: Your staff identity in MoPD CMS.
accountSaveError: Could not update your account. Please try again.
passwordSubtitle: Minimum 8 characters with upper, lower, number, and special character (12+ recommended).
securitySubtitle: Add an extra layer of protection when signing in.
mfaNotEnrolled: MFA is not enabled on your account.
backupCodesRemaining: {count, plural, =0 {No backup codes remaining} one {# backup code remaining} other {# backup codes remaining}}
backupCodesRegenerateHint: Enter your password. This invalidates all existing backup codes.
backupCodesNewWarning: Copy these codes now. They will not be shown again.
mfaDisableHint: Enter your current password to turn off MFA.
mfaDisableBlocked: Your role requires MFA and it cannot be disabled.
preferencesSubtitle: Choose how the staff console appears for you.
